name: Local Galaxy
description: 深空、暗金和青绿高光组成的默认桌面 GUI 主题。

name: Zentou Wireframe
description: 手绘风格的线框草图，包含方格纸背景、多标签页变体、便签注释。

name: People's Platform
description: 人民平台：块状粗体风格，活动海报能量：奶油色背景上的蓝、橙、红配色。

name: Creative Mode
description: Bold Neo-Brutalist theme with confident multi-tone accents.

name: Atelier Zero
description: Elegant paper-textured theme based on Warm Editorial.

name: Atelier Charcoal
description: Elegant graphite and charcoal-toned grey theme.

name: Atelier Mint
description: Quiet and refreshing mint-green editorial layout.

name: Atelier Sky
description: Crisp and clear paper-sky blue layout.

name: Atelier Pink
description: Warm soft pinkish paper with rose-terracotta highlights.

name: Atelier Grey
description: Quiet cool card grey with deep graphite highlights.

name: Atelier Lavender
description: Gentle pale lavender card paper with wisteria-purple accents.

name: Atelier Rust
description: Grove: Dark forest green canvas with warm rust-red highlights.

name: Atelier Coal
description: Obsidian: Dark charcoal space with radiant gold-orange highlights.

name: Atelier Abyss
description: Abyss: Deep oceanic indigo with high-contrast sky-blue accents.

name: Atelier Amber
description: Amber: Cozy charcoal-tea brown with radiant golden highlights.
